name: crawl-watcher
description: Notifies Claude when a background crawl completes, stalls, or has high error rate

name: rag-health
description: Auto-starts noxa-rag-daemon if not running, restarts it if it dies, and notifies Claude when TEI or Qdrant go offline, come back up, finish indexing, or log failures

name: store-usage
description: Notifies Claude when content store crosses disk usage thresholds or grows rapidly
